title: Creative & Social Media Marketing Associate
description:
Jigger & Pony Group is a leading hospitality company that owns and operates 5 restaurants and bars in Singapore. A pioneer in Singapore’s cocktail bar scene, the Group’s portfolio comprises of four cocktail bars and three restaurants.

Cocktail Bars:

  • Jigger & Pony (#1 Asia’s 50 Best Bars 2020, #9 World’s 50 Best Bars 2020)
  • Gibson Cocktail Bar – Asian ingredients-focus meets classic cocktails
  • Live Twice – Inspired by Mid-Century Japan

Restaurants:

  • Humpback – oyster bar and seafood restaurant with a focused wine & cocktail list
  • Caffe Fernet – New-Italian restaurant with a view of the Marina Bay waterfront

Creative & Social Media Marketing Associate

As Content & Social Producer, you will help bring our restaurants, bars, people, and stories to life across social platforms. You will be responsible for creating photographs, short-form video, and social-first content that captures the spirit of our venues.

This role is for someone who understands that, beyond aesthetics, great hospitality content is about energy, people, craft, and culture. The role sits within our marketing team that translates brand ideas and strategy into content that feels natural, relevant, and engaging.

Key Responsibilities

  • Plan, shoot, and edit photos and short-form video content for Instagram, TikTok, and other social platforms
  • Capture on-site content during events, trainings, prep, service, and behind-the-scenes moments
  • Support day-to-day social media content execution in line with brand guidelines and campaign calendars
  • Adapt key messages, narratives, and moments into engaging social formats
  • Assist with posting, scheduling, and basic community engagement where required
  • Work closely with marketing team colleagues to ensure visual and tonal consistency across brands
  • Collaborate with the wider marketing team to support launches, activations, and partnerships
  • Organise and maintain a structured library of video and photo assets for future use

What We’re Looking For

  • Experience in content creation, social media, or digital storytelling
  • Strong interest in hospitality, food, drinks, culture, or lifestyle brands
  • Comfortable shooting photos and videos on mobile, DJI, and DSLR/mirrorless cameras
  • Confident with basic photo and video editing tools (e.g. Adobe Lightroom, CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar)
  • Strong sense of timing, pacing, and storytelling for short-form video
  • Able to work independently on shoots while collaborating closely with a wider team

postedCompany.description:
JIGGER & PONY PTE. LTD.

Jigger & Pony (Facebook.com/JiggerandPony) has been voted as Singapore’s Best Bar by industry peers and is led by Aki Eguchi, voted Singapore’s Best Bartender. Starting in 2012, Jigger & Pony family is a fast-growing hospitality group with 5 F&B concepts Jigger & Pony / Sugarhall / Humpback / The Flagship / Gibson operating in Singapore. The first namesake concept, Jigger & Pony, has cemented its reputation as one of Asia’s best craft cocktail bar and gained a reputation for outstanding hospitality.

Jigger & Pony, Sugarhall and Gibson has just been voted as one of Asia's 50 Best Bars for 2 years in a row.
postedCompany.name: JIGGER & PONY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
